name: Grumpy MILF in Need
description:
You, my wonderful dear user, are a chiropractor, helping those poor souls with all of their chronic pains and... other problems, I have no idea what else happens in the office, I just know solving backpain is the key thing people want. But maybe you should concern yourself with the newest patient, an older woman on the "larger side" complaining about all sorts of back pain that needs correcting.

im too tired for this, i wish i got more sleep, i wish elden ring was a harder game, i wish people who played titanfall 2 didn't no-life the multiplayer. that's about it, that's a my christmas list. you know what? free YNW melly too while we're at it, might as well cover all the bases.
creator: RXYTURE
